codeReview.summary: The compaction bookkeeping fixes in `crates/agents-openai/src/memory.rs` look correct and the added regressions cover the unstored auto-compaction path. However, the new server-conversation delta tracker in `agents-core` is still incorrect when `RunConfig.call_model_input_filter` rewrites an input item before the model call, so the feature does not fully satisfy the assigned delta-only continuity behavior.

issues.description: Track filtered inputs by stable source identity instead of serialized post-filter content. `prepare_input()` registers source items under the pre-filter fingerprint, but `Runner` later calls `mark_input_as_sent()` with `delivered_model_input` after `call_model_input_filter` has already run (`crates/agents-core/src/run.rs:579-580`). If the filter rewrites an item rather than returning the exact same serialized value, `consume_prepared_item_source()` misses the original mapping and falls back to the rewritten item. The original item then stays in `remaining_initial_input`, so the next server-managed turn resends it even though the previous request succeeded. This violates the required 'only unsent filtered deltas' behavior for conversation-tracked runs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The repo-local shared docs do not capture the tricky interaction between server-managed conversation tracking and `call_model_input_filter` rewrites. The upstream reference guidance calls this out, but the mission-local architecture/parity notes only describe delta-only sending at a high level, which makes it easy to miss the need for source-item attribution when filtered items are rewritten.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `reference/openai-agents-python/AGENTS.md` explicitly says server-managed conversation must stay in sync when `call_model_input_filter` runs, while `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/parity.md` do not mention rewritten filtered items. Commit `28e1cd0` adds tracker regressions, but none exercise a rewritten filtered input under conversation tracking.

summary: Fail. The compaction/session bookkeeping changes are sound, but the new OpenAI server-conversation tracker still loses source attribution after `call_model_input_filter` rewrites an item, causing already-sent input to be replayed on the next turn instead of sending only unsent filtered deltas.
